title: Warmly Roasted Mediterranean Lamb Kebabs
description: A light and flavorful Mediterranean dish featuring roasted lamb, perfect for a warm meal, this recipe is also friendly to raw food preparation and can be sauteed for added flavor

ingredients.name: bell peppers
ingredients.notes: any color, cut into 1 inch pieces

instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, thyme, salt, and pepper
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Thread the lamb cubes, bell peppers, and onions onto skewers
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper
Roast the kebabs in the preheated oven for 20 minutes
After 20 minutes, shake the skewers to redistribute the ingredients
Continue roasting for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the lamb is cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit
Remove the kebabs from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving
